homeDescription: Learn practical personal finance through simple tools and small projects.
proj1Description: Track income and expenses with a simple interface.
proj2Description: It helps you plan savings goals and timelines.
proj3Description: Simulates different reward strategies (snowball vs avalanche).
aboutBody: This site is a portfolio of small tools and experiences focused on finance literacy. The goal is to make the concepts of money simple and practical.
projectBody: Simple tools to get you started right away.
